pages.title: About Lincoln Jopp | Lincoln Jopp MC MP
pages.meta_description: Lincoln Jopp MC MP has represented Spelthorne in Parliament since July 2024. Before entering politics, he had a distinguished career in the British Army, where he served in multiple conflict zones, including Northern Ireland, Iraq, and Afghanistan.

pages.text_excerpt: About Lincoln Jopp | Lincoln Jopp MC MP Skip to main content Lincoln Jopp MC MP for Spelthorne Main navigation About Lincoln News Campaigns In Parliament Contact Articles & Media Lincoln Jopp MC MP for Spelthorne About Lincoln Jopp Tweet Lincoln Jopp MC MP has represented Spelthorne in Parliament since July 2024. Before entering politics, he had a distinguished career in the British Army, where he served in multiple conflict zones, including Northern Ireland, Iraq, and Afghanistan. In recognition of his bravery, he was awarded the Military Cross (MC) for his gallant and distinguished service during the Sierra Leone conflict in May-June 1997. He also commanded the Scots Guards in Afghanistan during the summer of 2010, earning the Queen’s Commendation for Valuable Service. After retiring from the military, Lincoln transitioned to civilian life, becoming the Director and Chief Operating Officer of The Pension SuperFund. He lives in Sunbury, within the Spelthorne constituency, with his wife Caroline and their three children. Lincoln Jopp MC MP for Spelthorne Footer About RSS Accessibility Cookies Privacy About Lincoln Jopp In Parliament Promoted by Andrew Barrand on behalf of Lincoln Jopp MC both of 13 Station Approach, Ashford, TW15 2QN Copyright 2026 Lincoln Jopp MC MP. While the principles of more support in schools, evidence-led packages, early intervention, and more speech and language therapists are welcome, for the Spelthorne parents of children with SEND, it would appear to have raised more questions than answers. pages.text_excerpt: Contact | Lincoln Jopp MC MP Skip to main content Lincoln Jopp MC MP for Spelthorne Main navigation About Lincoln News Campaigns In Parliament Contact Articles & Media Lincoln Jopp MC MP for Spelthorne Contact Leave this field blank Westminster Office House of Commons, London SW1A 0AA 020 7219 7619 / 020 721 977 48 [email protected] On Facebook On X (Twitter) We do not respond to autogenerated mass campaign emails or copy and paste e-mails. Your correspondence will not be filed; however, you are welcome to write a personal letter or email to me outlining your concerns. If you have cc'd me into correspondence with a 3rd party but have not asked me to take any action on your behalf a response will not be sent but your correspondence will be filed. First Name Last Name Postcode Address id Address 1 Email Mobile number Message I would like to be kept up-to-date by the Conservatives on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . Volunteer for us In which of these ways can you help us? Delivering a few leaflets locally now and again Helping with office and admin tasks Making calls to voters and volunteers Joining our canvassing team to knock on doors Potentially standing to be a local Conservative Councillor Becoming a Digital Ambassador By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.
